ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of frantically pumping a fire extinguisher.  The arms will move in a rapid, alternating pump-like motion.  The animation will focus on the intensity and urgency of putting out a fire, and will not include the holding of a fire extinguisher as the arms do not have hands.  The left arm will pump downward, while the right arm will pump upward, creating a distinct visual rhythm. The sequence will consist of four frames to capture the dynamic movement.

frames.beat: arms start in a relaxed pose
left arm pumps down, right arm pumps up
arms pump in opposite directions again
